data.title: Colombia Limits Pension Funds' Overseas Investments to Boost Local Economy
data.description: Colombia has announced a new policy to cap pension funds' overseas investments at 30%, a decision supported by President Gustavo Petro. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that this move is intended to stimulate domestic economic growth by redirecting billions of dollars into local assets. The policy aims to strengthen the country's financial markets and encourage investment within Colombia, potentially leading to increased economic stability and development.

data.title: Uncertainty Surrounds Trump's Attendance at Mar-a-Lago Gala
data.description: Terms for the April 25 official gala at Mar-a-Lago indicate that U.S. President Donald Trump may not be able to attend, and organizers reserve the right to reschedule or cancel the event. According to NS3.AI, a spokesperson from Get Trump Memes stated that Trump is still anticipated to attend both the Florida luncheon and the White House Correspondents' Dinner in Washington that evening.

data.title: Iranian Foreign Minister: Safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz can be achieved through guidelines.
data.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Araqchi stated that safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz can be achieved through guidelines, and that the United States should cease its wars in Lebanon and all other regions. (Jinshi)

data.title: Iranian Foreign Minister Discusses Hormuz Strait Security
data.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi stated on April 10 that the safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz can be ensured through established guidelines. According to BlockBeats, he emphasized that the United States should cease its military activities in Lebanon and the entire region.

data.title: CZ: Willing to place a $1 billion bet on whether the divorce will be finalized.
data.description: CZ posted on the X platform that he is willing to bet $1 billion (or any amount of his choice) on the fact that he has officially divorced (long before today). If you agree to accept this bet, you can have a lawyer verify the divorce agreement.

data.title: Bitcoin Rises 3% Amid Improved Middle East Sentiment
data.description: Bitcoin's price increased by approximately 3%, reaching around $72,300, as optimism regarding easing tensions in the Middle East bolstered market sentiment. According to NS3.AI, Bitcoin outperformed other cryptocurrencies such as Ethereum, Solana, and XRP, which each saw gains of less than 1% over the past 24 hours. Meanwhile, U.S. stocks experienced a rebound, and oil prices retreated from their intraday highs.

data.title: TON's Major Upgrade Enhances Performance and Reduces Transaction Time
data.description: TON has successfully completed a significant upgrade, enhancing block generation speed by six times and overall performance by approximately ten times. According to NS3.AI, Pavel Durov highlighted that this upgrade has reduced transaction confirmation time from around 10 seconds to sub-second levels. Durov also mentioned that the next phase of TON's seven-step plan is focused on reducing transaction fees by about six times.

data.title: Futures Liquidations Surge to $100 Million in One Hour
data.description: Futures liquidations on major exchanges have surged to $100 million within the past hour. According to NS3.AI, the total liquidation amount over the last 24 hours has reached $285 million. This significant activity highlights the volatility and rapid movements in the futures market, impacting traders and investors alike.

data.title: Direct negotiations between Israel and Lebanon will begin next week.
data.description: Direct negotiations between Israel and Lebanon are set to begin next week. A senior Lebanese official stated that Lebanon is calling for a temporary ceasefire to facilitate negotiations with Israel. Any talks will be conducted "individually, but in the same format," similar to the ceasefire agreement between Iran and the United States brokered by Pakistan. Lebanon needs the United States as a guarantor for any agreement with Israel. (Jinshi)

data.title: USDC Treasury Mints 250 Million USDC
data.description: A significant transaction was reported by Whale Alert, indicating that 250 million USDC was minted at the USDC Treasury. According to NS3.AI, this development could have implications for the stablecoin market, as such large minting activities often influence liquidity and market dynamics. The minting of USDC, a stablecoin pegged to the U.S. dollar, is closely monitored by market participants due to its potential impact on trading volumes and market stability.

data.title: Russia Maintains Stance on Crypto Mining in Moscow
data.description: Russia's Energy Ministry has announced that there are no current plans to prohibit cryptocurrency mining in Moscow and its surrounding regions. According to NS3.AI, the ministry clarified that Moscow authorities have not made any official requests for such a ban. Furthermore, the ministry emphasized that a formal request from a governor is necessary to initiate the process, and no such step has been undertaken.

data.title: NATO Secretary General: Willing to play a role in possible actions in the Strait of Hormuz
data.description: NATO Secretary General Rutte stated that NATO is willing to play a role in potential actions in the Strait of Hormuz if possible. He added that within a stronger NATO framework, a stronger Europe will not take US leadership for granted, and that NATO is growing stronger thanks to US leadership and a collective commitment to continued freedom and security. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. Crude Prices Surge Despite Ceasefire Announcement
data.description: Benchmark U.S. crude prices increased by 6.8% to $100.79 per barrel early Thursday, even after a ceasefire announcement involving the United States, Iran, and Israel. According to NS3.AI, Brent crude surpassed $98 per barrel, while West Texas Intermediate exceeded $99. The average gas price in the U.S. reached $4.116 per gallon. Only four vessels navigated the Strait of Hormuz on Wednesday, and experts suggest that traffic is unlikely to improve without firm assurances of safe passage from Iran.

data.title: USDA Maintains Soybean Production Forecast for 2025/2026
data.description: The United States Department of Agriculture (USDA) has maintained its forecast for the 2025/2026 soybean production at 4.262 billion bushels, unchanged from its March estimate. According to Jin10, the USDA also projects the ending stocks for the same period to be 350 million bushels, slightly above the market expectation of 349 million bushels, and consistent with the March forecast. Additionally, the USDA anticipates the soybean yield to remain at 53 bushels per acre, the same as the previous month's projection.

data.title: Spot gold touched $4,800.
data.description: According to Gate data, spot gold touched $4,800 per ounce, up 1.71% on the day. Spot silver rose $2.00 to $76.10 per ounce, a gain of 2.70%. Brent crude oil fell more than 1.00% to $93.47 per barrel.

data.title: TRUMP Token Extends Luncheon Event Deadline
data.description: The TRUMP token has announced an extension of its luncheon leaderboard event by four days, with the new deadline set for April 14 at 12 p.m. Eastern Time. According to Foresight News, U.S. President Donald Trump is set to host a grand luncheon for TRUMP token holders, where he will be joined by 18 'superstars.' The top 297 participants will be granted access to the luncheon at Mar-a-Lago on April 25. Additionally, the top 29 holders will receive invitations to a special VIP reception and champagne toast, where they will have the opportunity to meet President Trump.

data.title: Telegram's founder stated that TON has completed a major upgrade, achieving "second-level confirmation," and the performance improvement is driving application expansion.
data.description: Telegram founder Pavel Durov announced that The Open Network (TON) has undergone a major upgrade, increasing block generation speed by 6 times, overall performance by approximately 10 times, and transaction confirmation time to sub-second levels, achieving a "near-instant" transaction experience. TON officials stated that this upgrade is based on Catchain 2.0, and the previous approximately 10-second confirmation time limited instant payments and application responsiveness; this upgrade will make "paying like sending a message" possible. Furthermore, TON stated that the higher block frequency will increase validator rewards and enhance staking incentives. Pavel Durov stated that this upgrade is the first step in the "Make TON Great Again" seven-step plan, with the next phase aiming to further reduce transaction fees by approximately 6 times. (The Block)

data.title: NATO Shifts Toward Balanced Transatlantic Partnership, Says Mark Rutte
data.description: NATO is transitioning from an 'unhealthy co-dependence' on the United States to a more balanced transatlantic alliance, according to Mark Rutte. Bloomberg posted on X that Rutte's comments came in response to U.S. President Donald Trump's criticism of the group regarding the Iran war. Rutte emphasized the importance of a partnership grounded in equality between Europe and the U.S. within NATO.

data.title: Bitcoin Surpasses 72,000 USDT with Daily Increase
data.description: Bitcoin has exceeded the 72,000 USDT mark, currently trading at 72,010.08 USDT, reflecting a daily increase of 1.33%. According to Foresight News, this development was observed through Bitget's market data.

data.title: Israel and Lebanon to Initiate Direct Talks for Peace
data.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu announced on April 9 that Israel will soon begin direct negotiations with Lebanon. According to BlockBeats, this decision follows multiple requests from Lebanon for direct talks. The discussions will focus on disarming Hezbollah and establishing peaceful relations between Israel and Lebanon. Israel expressed gratitude towards the Lebanese Prime Minister for his call to demilitarize Beirut.
